Rebuilding Better and Greener from the COVID-19 Pandemic

Strengthening policymaking for a sustainable future through data-driven simulations.

Learn More About The Project

Key Tools for Policy Insights

Designing Sustainable Economic Policies

How can tax and spending policies shape a better future?

Explore OG-Core
Optimizing Resource Management

How do climate, land, energy, and water use decisions impact sustainability?

Explore CLEWs
Forecasting Economic Trends & Policy Impacts

How can we prepare for economic shifts and global uncertainties?

Latest News And Events

UNDESA and ESCWA Collaborate to Implement WEFM Tool in Jordan and Tunisia

UN DESA and ESCWA are collaborating to support macroeconomic forecasting in Arab states using the WEFM model, with tailored efforts underway for Jordan and Tunisia.

Project Launch and Initial OG-Core Training Workshop in Ethiopia

Strengthening Ethiopia’s Economic Planning Capacity Through Advanced Policy Simulation Tools.

National Workshop on Advanced Training on Macro-Fiscal Modelling and Forecasting for Tunisia

The United Nations, through UN DESA and ESCWA, organized a national workshop in Tunisia focused on advanced training in macro-fiscal modelling and forecasting.

View All Posts

This project is funded by the United Nations Peace and Development Trust Fund.
